_comment_manifest_version: Chrome extension manifest format version (3 is current)
_comment_name: User-facing extension name shown in Chrome UI
name: ISweep
_comment_description: Short description displayed in extension listing
description: Safe content filtering for a better browsing experience
_comment_permissions: Runtime capabilities requested by the extension

_comment_permissions_detail.tabs: Enumerate and interact with open tabs
_comment_permissions_detail.activeTab: Temporarily access the active tab when invoked

_comment_host_permissions: Allowed host patterns for content scripts and requests

action._comment_default_popup: HTML shown when clicking the toolbar icon
action._comment_default_icon: Icons for different densities in toolbar

content_scripts._comment_matches: Inject plumbing on all pages early
content_scripts._comment_js: Plumbing script sets up messaging bridge
content_scripts._comment_run_at: Run before page load to hook early

content_scripts._comment_matches: YouTube watch pages for caption handling
Local docs pages to bridge site token
content_scripts._comment_js: Bridge script to send site token to extension

_comment_options_page: Standalone options page for configuring extension
_comment_icons: Extension icons used across Chrome surfaces
